name: Hot & Sour Mandarin Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Dried black mushrooms, soaked and shredded
2 to 3 dried wood ears, soaked and shredded (optional)
1/2 square Bean curd, cut into 1/4 x 2 inch strips (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring soup stock to a boil in a large pot and add shredded pork, black mushrooms, ginger, and wood ears. Cook for 2-3 minutes; discard ginger.
2. Add remaining ingredients, except cornstarch, eggs, and green onion. Reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes. Add cornstarch solution and cook until thickened and clear.
3. Remove from heat and slowly stir in beaten eggs. Garnish with green onion. Serve immediately.
